page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Accelerated BLAST compatible local sequence aligner.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Accelerated blast compatible local sequence aligner
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Sequence aligner for protein and translated DNA searches and functions as a drop-in replacement for the NCBI BLAST software tools. It is suitable for protein-protein search as well as DNA-protein search on short reads and longer sequences including contigs and assemblies, providing a speedup of BLAST ranging up to x20,000.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Sequence aligner for protein and translated DNA searches and functions as a drop-in replacement for the NCBI BLAST software tools. It is suitable for protein-protein search as well as DNA-protein search on short reads and longer sequences including contigs and assemblies, providing a speedup of BLAST ranging up to x20,000.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: DIAMOND is a new alignment tool for aligning short DNA sequencing reads to a protein reference database such as NCBI-NR.
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: Sequence aligner for protein and translated DNA searches and functions as a drop-in replacement for the NCBI BLAST software tools. It is suitable for protein-protein search as well as DNA-protein search on short reads and longer sequences including contigs and assemblies, providing a speedup of BLAST ranging up to x20,000.
